changes.copyButton: kept; resolves the authenticated user's own key from in-memory page state instead of visible markup
changes.downloadButton: kept; resolves the authenticated user's own key from in-memory page state
changes.apiContext: /api/me/products now returns current user and integration summary for the authenticated account

notes: Full keys are not printed in reports or artifacts.
Legacy success/gift flows may still show user-owned codes at creation/redeem time by design.
